title: Create: Lazy Engines
body:
A small create add-on that makes steam engines very configurable.

Adds config options for heat levels from passive sources and burners as well as the required size of the engine.

# A full list of configurable features:
- Heat level of passive sources and each stage of a blaze burner
- Tanks required for each level of the engine
- Speed of the engine (in RPM)
- Efficiency of the engine when passive
- Amount of boiler levels a singular engine supports
- Required water input (in mB)
